name: learner
goal: Backend, CS, and network skill-up from absolute beginner level
assumption: The learner should be treated as knowing almost nothing about backend, CS, and networking.

difficulty_rule.promote_when: 3 consecutive days with quiz score >= 75% and practice completed
difficulty_rule.hold_when: quiz score < 75% or reflection says the concept is unclear
difficulty_rule.review_when: wrong answer appears twice or practice blocker repeats
